title: Hide admin login shortcut from public website

requirements.text: In the public-facing website (Navigation.tsx and any other publicly visible components such as the homepage footer or any navigation links), remove or hide any visible shortcut, link, or button that directs regular visitors to the admin login page ('/admin'). The '/admin' route itself must remain functional and accessible by direct URL, but no clickable shortcut to it should be visible to public users.

quotes: Hide admin login in shortcut from website

acceptanceCriteria: No link, button, or text directing users to '/admin' or the admin login page is visible anywhere on the public-facing website (homepage, navigation bar, footer, etc.).
Navigating directly to '/admin' via the browser address bar still works and shows the admin login page.
The admin dashboard remains fully functional for authenticated admins.
No other navigation links or public content are affected by this change.

constraints: Do not remove or disable the '/admin' route — only hide the visible shortcut/link from the public UI.
Do not modify any immutable paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Adding authentication or access control to the /admin route itself.
